scenario_desc: Customer wants to deactivate their card, after deactivate successfully, agree to replace it with a new postal code

goal.description: Agent identified the customer's name successfully.
Show the customer's all active card numbers successfully.
Ask the customer for the reason for deactivating the card.
Inform the customer that the card has been deactivated successfully.
Agent showed the existing address and postal code of the customer.
Agent asked the customer for the new postal code
Inform the customer that the card replacement has been processed successfully.

shipping_address.description: use the existing shipping address on file
